articles.author: Lauren Forristal
articles.title: Amazon to end support for older Kindle devices - TechCrunch
articles.description: Amazon told Kindle owners this week that it's ending support for all e-readers released in 2012 or earlier, making them virtually unable to load any new content.
articles.content: Amazon is preparing to end support for Kindle devices released before 2012 cutting them off from the Kindle Store and making them virtually unable to load any new content. The company set a cutoff da… [+2869 chars]

articles.title: ASUS Resorts To Deceptive Practices, Raises The Prices Of Its Snapdragon X2 Elite Laptops Shortly After Reviews Go Live - Wccftech
articles.description: Almost immediately after views of ASUS’ Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme and Snapdragon X2 Elite laptops went live, the company raised prices
